title: Moroccan Harira Stew
description: A hearty, comforting Moroccan stew made with robust and light vegetables, perfect for a cold evening. Serve with crusty bread for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced red bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the robust tomatoes and cook for another 5 minutes.
Stir in the Moroccan harissa and salt. Cook for 1 minute.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
